title: BMC Fixes Teammachine SLR Flaws and Drops the Price of Entry
content:
The fifth-generation Teammachine SLR launched last summer as a lightweight superbike with a superbike price tag. Now, BMC is correcting our biggest complaints and bringing the 'Gravity Killer' to the masses.

Read the full article at BMC Fixes Teammachine SLR Flaws and Drops the Price of Entry on Velo.
author: Josh Ross
